mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VX_GroupChat_Yesterday (owner, new_chat_cnt, chat_total, chat_has_msg, new_member_cnt, member_total, member_has_msg, msg_total, starttime, createtime) VALUES
(#{item.owner}, #{item.newChatCnt}, #{item.chatTotal}, #{item.chatHasMsg}, #{item.newMemberCnt}, #{item.memberTotal}, #{item.memberHasMsg}, #{item.msgTotal}, #{item.starttime}, GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT owner, new_chat_cnt AS newChatCnt, chat_total AS chatTotal, chat_has_msg AS chatHasMsg, new_member_cnt AS newMemberCnt, member_total AS memberTotal, member_has_msg AS memberHasMsg, msg_total AS msgTotal, starttime, createtime FROM VX_GroupChat_Yesterday WHERE owner = #{owner} AND starttime >= CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(DAY, -10, GETDATE()), 120) ORDER BY starttime DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
